heroHeadline: Sheinbaum at 562 Days: BSC Visit Closes Barcelona Trip, Mexico to Host 2027 Democracy Summit, USMCA Round 2 Opens Monday
heroSubtitle: President Sheinbaum concluded her historic Barcelona trip on April 19, visiting the Barcelona Supercomputing Center (BSC-CNS) and meeting Catalan icon Joan Manuel Serrat, before returning to Mexico City. Mexico was formally confirmed to host the 2027 Summit in Defense of Democracy following the April 18 GPM summit where she joined Lula, Petro, Orsi, and PM Sánchez — formally restoring Mexico-Spain diplomatic relations after an eight-year estrangement. A second round of USMCA technical talks with USTR Greer opens April 20 in Mexico City, covering automotive, steel, aluminum, and agricultural sectors. The Universal Health Credential registration continues for citizens 85+ through April 30. Mexico's peso holds near a weekly high of 17.27–17.31 MXN/USD amid broad dollar weakness. Sheinbaum announced a 41% reduction in intentional homicides vs. December 2024, with March 2026 the lowest since 2015.
footerNote: Data sourced from Diario Oficial, INEGI, Banco de México, SNSP, Secretaría de Economía, Reuters, AP, El Universal, Reforma, Animal Político, Mexico News Daily, Infobae, Milenio, La Jornada, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, AtlasIntel, USTR, Chatham House, Mexico Business News, El Financiero, La Silla Rota, Proceso, CNN Español, Lopez Doriga, The Yucatan Times, Excelsior, La Razón de México, Quinto Poder
